violations.text: Molluscan Shellfish located in 3-door reach-in did not have the proper identification tags. Molluscan Shellstock tags must remain attached to the container in which the Molluscan Shellstock are received until the container is empty. Tags were placed with products at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/05/2025

The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher was 0 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. Establishment is to use the 3-bay sink to sanitize until the dishwasher is able to reach the proper chlorine sanitizer concentration. Establishment called for service at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 06/05/2025
Food items were observed with dates exceeding the disposition date. Food items were voluntarily disposed of. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/31/2024
The air gap on the prep sink must be fixed, the drain is extended into the air gap. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/21/2023
The air gap on the prep sink must be fixed, the drain is extended into the air gap. New Violation. Correct By: 11/21/2023

The drainage from the ice well sink is draining into a container. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. Corrective Action - Establishment must plum the ice well, or find an alternative method of storing ice such as an ice caddy. New Violation. Correct By: 11/21/2023
